raw_consumer_statement:
I ordered a product online, but I never received it. I was sent a junk product instead of the advertised product. 

The merchant is clearly running a scam. In fact, the product advertisement is no longer even available on the platform through the link I used to order it. 

I filed a dispute, as well as an appeal, with American Express, and they refuse to support me and instead are ruling in favor of the criminal running the online scam. 

In what world does a credit card company support criminals and steal from their customers? 

American Express support has declined to an appalling level.
